_comment: Faithful tight-passive NIT: opens ~16% and OVER-FOLDS to 3-bets/squeezes (~72%) via the fold_to_3bet lever (human_clone.py). The bed the light-3-bet / squeeze counter needs. The AF-gated vs-3bet split alone would keep a low-AF passive bed's FULL open (never folds to a 3-bet in play); the lever overrides it so the opener lays down the bottom (1-0.72)=28% of its open. overfold_factor 1.5 keeps it foldy postflop too.
